tasks.label: pnpm: typecheck
tasks.command: if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm" ]; then "$HOME/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm" exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; else corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; fi

tasks.label: pnpm: build
tasks.command: if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm build; elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm" ]; then "$HOME/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm" build; else corepack pnpm build; fi

tasks.label: pnpm: lint
tasks.command: if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm lint; elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm" ]; then "$HOME/.local/share/pnpm/pnpm" lint; else corepack pnpm lint; fi
